description: Trade event impact table. One row per event impact per trade version. Links a trade version (TRN_HDR_DBF) to the event that caused it. Joined to TRN_HDR_DBF via EVT_IMP_DBF.M_BO = TRN_HDR_DBF.M_NB. Further joined to EVT_EVENT_DBF via EVT_IMP_DBF.M_EVT = EVT_EVENT_DBF.M_REFERENCE, and to EVT_MAP_DBF via EVT_IMP_DBF.M_EVT_INTID = EVT_MAP_DBF.M_EVT_INTID.
example_query: SELECT MAP.M_EVT_DLABEL, COUNT(TRN.M_CONTRACT) FROM TRN_HDR_DBF TRN LEFT JOIN EVT_IMP_DBF IMP ON IMP.M_BO = TRN.M_NB LEFT JOIN EVT_EVENT_DBF EVT ON EVT.M_REFERENCE = IMP.M_EVT LEFT JOIN EVT_MAP_DBF MAP ON IMP.M_EVT_INTID = MAP.M_EVT_INTID WHERE TRN.M_TRN_FMLY='IRD' AND TRN.M_TRN_GRP='RTRN' AND TRN.M_TRN_TYPE='SWAP' GROUP BY MAP.M_EVT_DLABEL

fields.remark: Join key to TRN_HDR_DBF.M_NB. Links this event impact to the specific trade version it produced.
Join key to EVT_EVENT_DBF.M_REFERENCE. Links to the event record that contains user, group, and execution details.
Internal event type code. Join key to EVT_MAP_DBF.M_EVT_INTID to resolve the human-readable event label.
The date on which the event was performed.
